Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/unnecessaryTypeofType_preview.ts(10,23): warning TS377090: This `typeof ... .Type` query can be replaced with `UsersRepo.User`. effect(unnecessaryTypeofType)


==== /.src/unnecessaryTypeofType_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryTypeofType:warning
    import { Schema } from "effect"
    
    export namespace UsersRepo {
      export const User = Schema.Struct({ id: Schema.Finite })
      export type User = typeof User.Type
    }
    
    export const preview: typeof UsersRepo.User.Type = { id: 1 }
                          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377090: This `typeof ... .Type` query can be replaced with `UsersRepo.User`. effect(unnecessaryTypeofType)
